name: getIdTokenClaims hook for custom ID token claims
outcome: Consumers can add custom claims (roles, tenant, acr) to issued ID tokens without being able to corrupt the protocol claims.
scope: Wire the optional getIdTokenClaims hook into the ID token builder with a protocol-claims-win merge.
acceptance_criteria: Custom claims returned by getIdTokenClaims appear in the issued id_token
The hook cannot override iss, sub, aud, exp, iat or at_hash
When the hook is absent the id_token contains exactly the protocol claim set
steps: ID token builder — call the optional getIdTokenClaims hook with userId, scopes, client and nonce, and merge its result into the ID token
ID token builder — apply the merge so protocol claims always win over hook-supplied claims
test/unit — cover the merge and the protocol-claims-win guard
notes: The hook keeps the default ID token lean while removing the hard wall; it also satisfies the deferred claims-in-ID-token need without a separate flag.
